signals.headline: Cavaliers Lead 2-0 in First-Round Playoff Series | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Lead 2-0 in First-Round Playoff Series | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Cleveland Cavaliers hold a commanding 2-0 series lead** over the Toronto Raptors following a 115-105 Game 2 victory.[3] Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points and James Harden added 28 points in the win.[3] The series is now headed to Toronto for Game 3, scheduled for Thursday at 8:00 PM ET.[1]
